name: The Gilded Hand
description: A private enforcement company backed by Court capital, operating where the Compact won't go officially. Deniable, professional, and expensive.
currentPriority: Expanding operations into the Pale to fill the vacuum left by declining House activity

name: The Ashen Compact
description: A rival organization occupying the same grey space as the player — competing for the same contracts, the same recruits, and the same territory. They were founded by someone who once worked for House Valdric.
currentPriority: Establishing district presence before the player consolidates. Director Forn wants what the player has.

name: The Iron Covenant
description: A disciplined mercenary brotherhood that operates like a guild — strict internal hierarchy, long-term contracts, and an appetite for territory. Expansion is their doctrine.
currentPriority: Expanding control of the Ironworks district and cutting off rival contract pipelines.

name: The Pale Sisters
description: A covert network of agents and fixers with roots in the old regime. They apply pressure through information, blackmail, and strategic recruitment — rarely open violence.
currentPriority: Recruiting from unstable houses and undermining city institutions from within.
